name: Raidraptor's Phantom Knights Claw
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＲＲ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レイド・ラプターズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ファントム・クロー
desc: When a monster effect is activated: Detach 1 material from your DARK Xyz Monster; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card, then if the detached material was a "The Phantom Knights", "Raidraptor", or "Xyz Dragon" card, 1 "Raidraptor" Xyz Monster you control gains ATK equal to that destroyed monster's original ATK. You can only activate 1 "Raidraptor's Phantom Knights Claw" per turn.
eff: When a monster effect is activated: Detach 1 material from your DARK Xyz Monster; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card, then if the detached material was a "The Phantom Knights", "Raidraptor", or "Xyz Dragon" card, 1 "Raidraptor" Xyz Monster you control gains ATK equal to that destroyed monster's original ATK. You can only activate 1 "Raidraptor's Phantom Knights Claw" per turn.

mst: Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
